mapper.select: SELECT c.id, c.content, c.user_id, c.post_id, c.parent_id, c.create_time, u.username, u.nickname, u.avatar FROM comment c LEFT JOIN user u ON c.user_id = u.id WHERE c.post_id = #{postId} AND c.parent_id IS NULL ORDER BY c.create_time DESC

SELECT c.*, u.username, u.nickname, u.avatar, p.title AS postTitle FROM comment c LEFT JOIN user u ON c.user_id = u.id LEFT JOIN post p ON c.post_id = p.id WHERE c.user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY c.create_time DESC LIMIT #{offset}, #{limit}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM comment WHERE user_id = #{userId}
